name: FunctionDescriptor
summary: Describe a DesignScript function in a imported library

constructors.name: FunctionDescriptor(Dynamo.Engine.FunctionDescriptorParams)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Dynamo.Engine.FunctionDescriptor class.

methods.name: Equals(object)
methods.summary: Overrides equality check of two Dynamo.Engine.FunctionDescriptor objects

params.name: obj
params.doc: Dynamo.Engine.FunctionDescriptor object to compare with the current one

returns.doc: Returns true if two Dynamo.Engine.FunctionDescriptor objects are equals

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Overrides computing the hash code for the Dynamo.Engine.FunctionDescriptor

returns.doc: The hash code for this Dynamo.Engine.FunctionDescriptor

properties.name: Assembly
properties.summary: Returns full path to the assembly the defined this function. This is not always an assembly path, it might be a path to a .ds file or builtin token like 'operators'.

properties.name: CanUpdatePeriodically
properties.summary: This attribute sets whether the function enables periodic update of the workspace.

properties.name: Category
properties.summary: The category of this function.

properties.name: ClassName
properties.summary: Class name of this function. If the function is global, return String.Empty.

properties.name: Description
properties.summary: A comment describing the function along with the signature

properties.name: DisplayName
properties.summary: QualifiedName with leading namespaces removed.

properties.name: FunctionName
properties.summary: Function name.

properties.name: InputParameters
properties.summary: Inputs for Node

properties.name: IsBuiltIn
properties.summary: Indicates if it is a built-in function

properties.name: IsLacingDisabled
properties.summary: Returns if the lacing strategy is disabled

properties.name: IsObsolete
properties.summary: Indicates if the function is obsolete

properties.name: IsOverloaded
properties.summary: Indicates if the function overloads

properties.name: IsPackageMember
properties.summary: Indicates if the function is packaged element (either zero-touch DLLs or DYFs)

properties.name: IsVarArg
properties.summary: Does the function accept a variable number of arguments?

properties.name: IsVisibleInLibrary
properties.summary: This attribute sets, if this function is shown in library or not.

properties.name: MangledName
properties.summary: A unique name to identify a function. It is necessary when a function is overloaded.

properties.name: Namespace
properties.summary: Returns namespace where the function is specified

properties.name: ObsoleteMessage
properties.summary: Message specified if function is obsolete

properties.name: Parameters
properties.summary: Function parameters.

properties.name: PathManager
properties.summary: Returns instance of IPathManager

properties.name: QualifiedName
properties.summary: The string that is used to search for this function.

properties.name: ReturnKeys
properties.summary: If the function returns a dictionary, ReturnKeys is the key collection used in returned dictionary.

properties.name: ReturnType
properties.summary: Function return type.

properties.name: Returns
properties.summary: If the XML documentation for the function includes a returns field, this parameter contains a collection of tuples of output names to descriptions. Otherwise, this list will be empty.

properties.name: Signature
properties.summary: The full signature of the function.

properties.name: Summary
properties.summary: Returns summary of the function from its documentation xml using the corresponding FunctionDescriptor object.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: Function type.

properties.name: UnqualifedClassName
properties.summary: Returns class name without namespace

properties.name: UserFriendlyName
properties.summary: Return a user friendly name. E.g., for operator '+' it will return 'Add'
